title: pyproject toml fixed for podman submodules invisibility

comments.body: @jyejare great catch and quick fix, thank you so much. please sign the commit and push it again, I'll approve it and release the fix
@inknos Done, Sorry I missed that at first.
That's ok. I am approving the checks and will follow up soon. Thanks again
@inknos Yeah, my pleasure. Saw that as a quick fix and dont want podman python world to shout because of that :)
